Loss of arginine due to transpeptidation/Deletion of R
Addition of lysine due to transpeptidation/Addition of K
Removal of initiator methionine from protein N-terminus/Deletion of M
Loss of C-terminal K from Heavy Chain of MAb/Deletion of K
carbamidomethylated Cys that undergoes beta-elimination and Michael addition of methylamine
Propionate labeling reagent heavy form (+3amu), N-term  K
Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G

project.title: HPLC-MS datasets of the protein mix immunoprecipitated by SIRT7 antibody in HaCaT cells
project.projectDescription: We conducted HPLC-MS analysis of the protein mix immunoprecipitated by SIRT7 antibody under non-IR and 8 Gy X-ray irradiation to identify the interacting proteins of SIRT7 in HaCaT cells.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: We performed immunoprecipitation of SIRT7 followed with high performance liquid chromatography-mass spectrometry (HPLC-MS) and tried to identify the interacting protein partners of SIRT7.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The mass spectra were subjected to sequence database for searching with Proteome Discoverer v2.1 software (Thermo Scientific) and the results were analyzed by Xcalibur 2.0.
